actionUnits.condition: Call Mirar.Mira() on PosAparicionBola to enable its assigned Canvas. MonoBehaviour matches script Mirar (m_Script fileID: 11500000, guid: 8817b2a8c34ba5d4d941beaf47d0be6f) with serialized field canvas=fileID 3689742487867136667. Start() will set camaraAMirar=Camera.main and LateUpdate() will face the canvas to the camera.
Call Mirar.Para() on PosAparicionBola to disable its assigned Canvas. MonoBehaviour matches script Mirar (m_Script fileID: 11500000, guid: 8817b2a8c34ba5d4d941beaf47d0be6f).
